scripts.worker:dev: pnpm build && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --enable-source-maps -e "import('./dist/worker/run-once.js').then(({ runWorkerLoop }) => runWorkerLoop({ idleDelayMs: 1000, onResult: (result) => result === 'processed' && console.log(new Date().toISOString(), result) }))"
scripts.worker:once: pnpm build && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --enable-source-maps -e "import('./dist/worker/run-once.js').then(async ({ runWorkerOnce }) => console.log(await runWorkerOnce()))"
scripts.test:db: node -e "if (!process.env.TEST_DATABASE_URL) { console.error('TEST_DATABASE_URL is required for backend DB tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run src/infrastructure/persistence/repositories.test.ts
scripts.lint: echo "backend lint is not configured yet"
scripts.format: echo "backend format is not configured yet"
